microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, configurable model across distributed engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — a rack-level drill program delivered in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model adopted across enterprise deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict data compliance and access controls.

Accelerated planning throughput by building an **internal AI agent** to automate drill scheduling workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Defined and tracked **funnel and adoption metrics** across the resilience program, instrumenting dashboards to monitor feature uptake, recovery performance, and re-engagement signals that informed quarterly roadmap prioritization.
microsoft_2023: Drove **activation and adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and onboarding sessions across 14 key Azure teams that saved 37 engineering hours monthly and reduced time-to-value for new users.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical FTUX gaps and influencing the inclusion of intent-based YAML generation as a high-priority roadmap item.

Improved **feature adoption and retrieval speed** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and supporting self-serve onboarding for new users.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams with competing roadmap priorities.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate launch toil by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths for enterprise deployments.

Engineered a **Power BI analytics dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments in the region launch lifecycle.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional execution across IT and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake process across distributed engineering teams.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil for a large-scale robotics fleet.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that improved activation and conversion rates across the sales funnel.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve onboarding flow and discoverability.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had been obscured by inconsistent manual tracking processes.
